attributes.action: Legalise, regulate, and tax cannabis for adult use in the UK
attributes.additional_details: Prohibition has failed. The UK is a top exporter of legal medical cannabis, yet criminalises its own citizens for the same plant. Medical access is a two-tier system where only the wealthy afford private clinics, forcing 1.8M sick people to the black market. Legalising and taxing adult-use cannabis will defund street gangs, free up police resources, and generate over £1bn annually for the NHS and public services. It is time to follow allied nations and adopt a common-sense policy.
attributes.background: The Government must bring forward legislation to fully legalise, regulate, and tax the production, sale, and possession of cannabis for adult use. Furthermore, the Government must ensure fair, barrier-free access to medical cannabis on the NHS to end the current two-tier healthcare divide.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Legalise and regulate cannabis for adults across the United Kingdom
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760967
